name: constipation
title: best herbal teas for constipation
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra tea contains bioactive constituents such as glycyrrhizin, flavonoids, and triterpenoids, which help to treat constipation by relaxing the muscles in the digestive tract and increasing the movement of food through the intestines. This herbal tea also possesses anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm the digestive system, thereby reducing symptoms of constipation.
